author: CHEN
description: AI-driven Markdown-to-HTML publishing studio. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
name: Galley Studio

releases.author: kinrochen
releases.description:
## Galley Studio 0.2.6

- 修复“复制到公众号”在保存草稿或发布后丢失排版的问题，桌面端优先写入原生 HTML 富文本剪贴板。
- 保留生成的公众号 HTML 片段，避免复制前的二次重写改变排版结构。
- 拆分“复制到公众号”和“复制源码”，并显示更明确的复制失败原因。
- 增加公众号片段、Electron 剪贴板桥接和工具栏行为的回归测试。

### Installation assets

Obsidian users can install this release with `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`. The ZIP contains the complete packaged release together with license notices.
releases.name: Galley Studio 0.2.6

releases.author: kinrochen
releases.description:
## Galley Studio 0.2.5

- Fix vault-relative images in the visual editor while preserving original HTML paths.
- Render validated local PNG, JPEG, and WebP images inside the strict sandbox preview.
- Keep preview CSP, empty sandbox, and mobile safety boundaries unchanged.
- Add product screenshots to the bilingual launch article.

完整更新说明见 CHANGELOG.md。
releases.name: Galley Studio 0.2.5

releases.author: kinrochen
releases.description:
## 中文

- 修复 Obsidian 桌面端 Node.js 动态导入被解析为 app:// 请求而导致的 CORS 错误。
- 恢复 Galley Studio 控制台、设置页以及 Codex CLI / Claude CLI Agent。
- 新增仅桌面端可用的受限 Node 模块加载桥，并保持移动端预览边界。
- 重写中英文项目介绍与宣传博客。

## English

- Fix Obsidian desktop CORS failures caused by Node.js dynamic imports resolving as app:// requests.
- Restore the Galley Studio console, settings, and Codex CLI / Claude CLI agents.
- Add a restricted Desktop-only Node module bridge while preserving the mobile preview boundary.
- Refresh the bilingual project introduction and launch article.
releases.name: Galley Studio 0.2.4

releases.author: kinrochen
releases.description:
修复 Obsidian 插件审核中的动态 <script> 创建失败项。

- 移除生产构建中 HugeRTE 未使用的运行时脚本加载器
- 增加构建产物代码安全审计，阻止动态 script 元素再次进入 main.js
- 完成 lint、类型检查、1425 项测试及发布包审计
releases.name: Galley Studio 0.2.3

releases.author: kinrochen
releases.description:
Obsidian review compatibility release.

- Removes all blocking unsafe innerHTML and runtime style injection findings.
- Guards local CLI Node.js access behind Desktop-only dynamic imports.
- Adds the official Obsidian ESLint review gate.
- Includes safe HTML fragment parsing, static HugeRTE CSS, and Obsidian confirmation modals.

Install assets use the exact release tag 0.2.2 (without a v prefix).
releases.name: Galley Studio 0.2.2

releases.author: kinrochen
releases.description:
# Changelog

All notable changes to Galley Studio are documented here.

## 0.2.1 — 2026-07-16

- Rename the plugin to **Galley Studio** with the unique Obsidian plugin ID
  `galley-studio`.
- Rename public view types and the release archive to prevent collisions with
  the existing marketplace plugin named `Galley`.
- Move the source repository to
  <https://github.com/kinrochen/Galley-Studio>.
- Keep `.galley.html`, sidecar metadata, settings structures, and other document
  contracts compatible with existing files.

## 0.2.0 — 2026-07-16

### 中文

- 将 Galley Studio 控制台改为可复用的 Obsidian 右侧边栏视图，并完善窄宽度响应式布局。
- 让 HTML 文件直接显示在文件管理器中；单击即可进入可复用的预览、可视化编辑和源码工作台。
- 改进 HTML 预览尺寸、源码格式化与语法高亮，以及生成结果中的 HTML 提取。
- 重做生成对话：展示初始提示词和模型轮次，修复空白气泡、滚动回顶、状态不一致和错误不可读问题。
- 优化插件内 Agent 流程，将文章、主题和内置 Skill 直接注入提示词，避免重复询问已提供的信息。
- 将插件内模型与本地 CLI 的生成超时统一调整为 30 分钟。
- 重做主题实验室，使主题草稿能够通过对话生成、预览并确认保存。
- 更新中英文文档、作者与捐赠信息，并补充
  [gzh-design-skill](https://github.com/isjiamu/gzh-design-skill) 的来源与许可证说明。

### English

- Open the Galley Studio console as a reusable Obsidian right-sidebar view with responsive narrow layouts.
- Show HTML files in the file explorer and open them directly in a reusable Preview, Visual Edit, and Source workbench.
- Improve preview sizing, formatted syntax-highlighted source editing, and HTML extraction from mixed model responses.
- Rebuild the generation conversation with the initial prompt, model rounds, stable scrolling, consistent states, and readable errors.
- Improve the in-plugin Agent workflow by injecting the article, theme, and bundled Skill directly instead of asking for known inputs again.
- Increase provider and local CLI generation timeouts to 30 minutes.
- Redesign Theme Lab around conversational draft generation, preview, and explicit save confirmation.
- Refresh bilingual documentation, author and funding metadata, and attribution for
  [gzh-design-skill](https://github.com/isjiamu/gzh-design-skill).
releases.name: Galley Studio 0.2.1

releases.author: kinrochen
releases.description:
# Changelog

All notable changes to Galley are documented here.

## 0.2.0 — 2026-07-16

### 中文

- 将 Galley 控制台改为可复用的 Obsidian 右侧边栏视图，并完善窄宽度响应式布局。
- 让 HTML 文件直接显示在文件管理器中；单击即可进入可复用的预览、可视化编辑和源码工作台。
- 改进 HTML 预览尺寸、源码格式化与语法高亮，以及生成结果中的 HTML 提取。
- 重做生成对话：展示初始提示词和模型轮次，修复空白气泡、滚动回顶、状态不一致和错误不可读问题。
- 优化插件内 Agent 流程，将文章、主题和内置 Skill 直接注入提示词，避免重复询问已提供的信息。
- 将插件内模型与本地 CLI 的生成超时统一调整为 30 分钟。
- 重做主题实验室，使主题草稿能够通过对话生成、预览并确认保存。
- 更新中英文文档、作者与捐赠信息，并补充
  [gzh-design-skill](https://github.com/isjiamu/gzh-design-skill) 的来源与许可证说明。

### English

- Open the Galley console as a reusable Obsidian right-sidebar view with responsive narrow layouts.
- Show HTML files in the file explorer and open them directly in a reusable Preview, Visual Edit, and Source workbench.
- Improve preview sizing, formatted syntax-highlighted source editing, and HTML extraction from mixed model responses.
- Rebuild the generation conversation with the initial prompt, model rounds, stable scrolling, consistent states, and readable errors.
- Improve the in-plugin Agent workflow by injecting the article, theme, and bundled Skill directly instead of asking for known inputs again.
- Increase provider and local CLI generation timeouts to 30 minutes.
- Redesign Theme Lab around conversational draft generation, preview, and explicit save confirmation.
- Refresh bilingual documentation, author and funding metadata, and attribution for
  [gzh-design-skill](https://github.com/isjiamu/gzh-design-skill).
releases.name: Galley 0.2.0
